items.title: Where Will Rigetti Computing Stock Be in 5 Years?
items.author: Will Ebiefung
items.description: Rigetti Computing, a quantum computing startup, experienced a significant stock rally followed by a sharp pullback. Despite potential in quantum computing, the company currently lacks profitability and faces challenges in developing commercially viable technology, with experts suggesting widespread quantum computing adoption might not occur until around 2040.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Reported minimal sales ($1.95 million), significant operating losses ($20.5 million), no clear path to profitability, and uncertain timeline for commercial quantum computing viability
